meta.title: Vanta One - Product Launch
meta.description: A cinematic product launch page generated with cinematic-site-builder.

copy.title: A device story with real-time presence
copy.body: Use cinematic depth, orbital movement, and responsive copy to make the product feel tangible.

copy.title: Every feature enters as a scene beat
copy.body: The page maps scroll progress into visual phases instead of stacking independent animations.

copy.title: Open the waitlist with a memorable finish
copy.body: A portal-style convergence creates a clear final action without losing the visual system.
